text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After the Satsuki Sho, the world shifts<n>its gaze
from the "top two" to the<n>battle between the three
powerful<n>members of "BNW"!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Namely—Biwa Hayahide, Narita<n>Taishin, and
Winning Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket challenges Narita<n>Taishin to a
scrimmage to prepare for<n>the race of her
dreams—the Japanese<n>Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Racing against a rival who is striving<n>so
single-mindedly toward her dream<n>should have a
good effect on Narita<n>Taishin... But does it really?
